steps.text: {guide_mentor} pulls on a tiny captain's hat — tonight you both run a lighthouse from {room}.
Stack {count} cushions to make the lighthouse tower.
Hold up the brightest {prop} you can find — that is your beacon.
Sweep the beacon slowly across the room while {guide_mentor} watches the waves.
Suddenly {guide_mentor} spots a ship in trouble!
The ship spots your dazzling flashes and steers safely into harbor. {guide_mentor} salutes you, captain.
Your song carries across the waves and the sailors hum along. The ship glides home.
{quest_giver} unrolls a wrinkly old map. X marks somewhere in {room}!
Take {count} giant steps from the doorway.
(embedded joke — body rendered from corpus at advance time)
Now turn left and {action_verb} until you bump into something soft.
Look down — what is the closest {prop} to your foot?
(embedded song — body rendered from corpus at advance time)
{quest_giver} whispers: the treasure is hidden under or behind it.

choices.label: Peek behind it like a spy

steps.text: Underneath you find an imaginary chest of {adjective} jewels — {quest_giver} declares you wealthy beyond belief!
Behind it sits a tiny pretend dragon, fast asleep on the gold. You tiptoe away rich and quiet.
{trickster} pulls on imaginary goggles. Welcome to the lab!
Find {count} ingredients that are NOT food. Line them up on the counter.
Pick the most {adjective} one and hold it high.
Pretend to mix it in a giant bowl while making a bubbly sound.
The potion is ready! What does it do?
{trickster} swells up to fill the whole {room}! You both giggle until the potion wears off.
{trickster} vanishes! You search the room narrating every step until the potion fades.
{trickster} bursts into a wobbly opera. You bow as the audience and clap loudly.
Right now, choose: what kind of hideout will you and {friend} build tonight?
You drape a blanket between two chairs and stuff in {count} pillows.
You line up cushions in a row and tape a {prop} to the front as the control panel.
Crawl inside with {friend} and pull the entrance closed.
Whisper one secret to {friend} that nobody else knows.
Listen to the quiet hum of your hideout.
Yawn together. Best fort ever.
{quest_giver} ties on a tiny red bow tie. Welcome to the circus!
Pick the act you want to start with.
Lay down a piece of string and walk along it without falling off.
Pretend {quest_giver} is a wild lion. Tame it with {count} brave commands.
Lift the heaviest {prop} in {room} above your head and roar.
The crowd goes wild! Take {count} bows.
{quest_giver} hands you a pretend gold medal. The show is a hit.
{helper_townsperson} runs the post office today. You are the only customer.
Find a small {prop} to mail to a faraway friend.
Wrap it in a sock or napkin. Fancy packaging!
Now decide how it should travel.
{helper_townsperson} loads it into a pretend rocket. Five, four, three — blast off! It arrives in seconds.
A slow turtle plods off with the parcel. It will get there next year, but it will get there.
{guide_mentor} swings down on an imaginary vine. The jungle is full of mystery!
{action_verb} carefully past the wild furniture beasts.
Spot a {adjective} bird perched on top of a {prop}.
Crouch low and creep closer without scaring it.
The bird turns and notices you!
The bird whistles back and circles you twice. You have a new jungle friend.
The bird hops onto your finger and eats the berry. {guide_mentor} captures the moment in a mental photo.
{quest_giver} announces: today we build a robot. What kind?
Gather {count} kitchen items to stand in for robot parts.
Find {count} shiny things that could be flashing robot lights.
Round up {count} pillows for the robot's giant arms.
Stack and stack until you have a {adjective} robot taller than {quest_giver}.
Press an imaginary START button on its chest.
Move like the robot would. Beep boop!
Power down with a long sssshhhhh. {quest_giver} declares the prototype a success.
{quest_giver} taps a tiny chef hat. The kitchen battle begins!
Pick a pretend dish to make.
Whisk imaginary clouds together with a {prop}. Soft and fluffy!
Pour pretend molten chocolate into a tiny cup using a {prop}. Careful, hot!
Serve a steaming spoonful to {quest_giver} for the official taste test.
{quest_giver}'s eyes go wide. Critic verdict?

choices.label: Send it back for one more pinch of magic

steps.text: {quest_giver} declares it the best ever. You take a chef's bow.
You sprinkle invisible magic dust and serve again. PERFECT this time. Standing ovation!
{frenemy} whispers: did you hear that? Something {adjective} is in {room}.
Tiptoe in slowly. Check behind the biggest {prop} first.
Listen with one ear pressed to a wall.
A tiny ghost named Boo pops out and giggles.
Boo wants to be your friend. How do you greet a ghost?

choices.label: Offer a high five through the air

steps.text: Boo waves back and floats a little loop. {frenemy} declares Boo officially adopted.
Boo's hand passes through yours with a giggle. You both crack up. Best new pal.
{quest_giver} adjusts a tiny detective hat. A snack has gone missing from {room}!
Pick a starting clue.
You find a single crumb on the {prop}. Suspicious!
A cushion confesses with a soft squeak. Eyewitness obtained!
You find one tiny print shaped exactly like {quest_giver}'s {body_part}.
All clues point one way. {quest_giver} looks guilty and shrugs.
Case closed! What's the verdict?
{quest_giver} sighs in relief and promises to ask next time. Justice served warmly.
{quest_giver} solemnly agrees to a sharing pact. The kingdom of snacks is fair again.
{helper_townsperson} grabs a {prop} as a microphone. Live from {room}, weather time!
Stand on the tallest safe spot to be seen by viewers.
Announce today's pretend weather in your most serious voice.
Suddenly the forecast turns wild!
Ducked under a {prop} as noodles fell from the ceiling. {helper_townsperson} catches some on its head.
Soft colorful flakes drift down. You and {helper_townsperson} dance through the {adjective} flurry.
{helper_townsperson} rolls out a velvet rope. Welcome to the gallery in {room}!
Pick {count} ordinary things and arrange them into a sculpture.
Give your masterpiece a {adjective} title.
{helper_townsperson} walks around it like a tiny art critic.
{helper_townsperson} nods seriously and asks: what is the price?
{helper_townsperson} pays in a long squishy hug. The piece is sold!
{helper_townsperson} giggles loudly. Sale complete. The gallery is a hit.
Choose your role on the great cushion express.
Punch pretend tickets with your fingers. {sidekick} is your first passenger.
Climb to the front and grip the imaginary throttle.
All aboard! Toot toot!
The train chugs out of the station and through {room}.
Halfway there, a wobbly bridge appears!
How do you cross?
WHOOSH! The bridge wobbles but holds. You arrive a hero. {sidekick} cheers.
Each plank creaks. You exhale on the far side. {sidekick} pats your shoulder proudly.
{friend} blows imaginary bubbles. You both sink down into a {adjective} ocean inside {room}.
Pick {count} pretend sea snacks for the tea party.
Set them on top of a {prop} that doubles as your underwater table.
Float into your seat. Move slowly — water is heavy!
A curious fish swims up.
The fish nibbles a snack and tells a quiet story. You all yawn together.
It wiggles past, tail tickling your nose. The tea is calm and perfect.
{quest_giver} unrolls a tiny scroll: a dragon has been spotted near {room}!
Pack a {prop} as your dragon-watching kit.
{action_verb} carefully toward the rumored cave (under the table).
Crouch and peek inside.
There it is! A small {adjective} dragon, sound asleep.
You draw it perfectly in your mind. {quest_giver} keeps the only copy. Top-secret discovery!
The dragon opens one eye, smiles, and goes back to sleep. You made a polite friend.
{friend} drives an imaginary car into the wash bay set up in {room}.
Pick the wash level.
Make swooshing motions and tickle {friend}'s {body_part} like soft brushes.
Wave a {prop} like a foam wand and sing the colors as they appear.
Make a quick whoosh and a single big splash sound.
Now the giant fan! Wave your hands fast to dry {friend}.
{friend} drives off shiny and {adjective}. Best wash ever!
{quest_giver} sniffs the air. Something is rumbling under {room}!
Build a volcano by piling {count} cushions in a cone.
Place a {prop} on top as the crater.
Make the volcano rumble with a low growly voice.
It's about to blow! Pick the eruption.
POOF! Imaginary glitter showers down. {room} sparkles for a week. {quest_giver} is dazzled.
BWAHAHA! Laughter pours out and you both crack up until you need a sip of water.
{guide_mentor} taps a tiny baton. Tonight, {room} hosts an orchestra!
Pick your section.
Find a steady rhythm. {count} taps, then pause. Repeat!
Mime slow long bow strokes across an invisible cello.
Take a deep breath and hum a low {adjective} note.
{guide_mentor} signals the downbeat. The whole room joins in!
Build to a giant crescendo. Louder! LOUDER!
End on a long held note. Then perfect silence.
Bow to {guide_mentor} and to the imaginary audience. Bravo!
{sidekick} hops into the laundry-basket balloon. Today you fly!
Cast off! Climb high above {room}.
Spot {count} {adjective} clouds you have never noticed before.
A bird flies up to chat.
Where should you sail next?
You drift over peaks of marshmallow. {sidekick} pretends to nibble a cloud and grins.
Wide blue stretches below. The breeze is hush-quiet. {sidekick} dozes on your shoulder.
{quest_giver} announces a balancing challenge in {room}!
Place a soft {prop} on top of your {body_part}.
Stand still for {count} slow breaths without dropping it.
Feeling brave? Pick the next round.
You glide around like a circus star. {quest_giver} applauds with two tiny paws.
WHOOSH! It tumbles, but you laugh and catch it. {quest_giver} declares it the best try.
{guide_mentor} dims the lights in {room}. Time for shadows!
Hold up your {body_part} and watch its shadow stretch tall.
Make {count} different animal shapes with your hands.
Pick a shadow story to act out.

choices.label: A bird teaches a fish to fly

steps.text: The bunny offers the wolf a {prop}. They become best friends. {guide_mentor} sniffles happily.
Together they soar over {room}. The fish glows with joy. Beautiful ending.
Pick the foundation for your handshake with {toy}.
Now add a wiggle and a high-pitched yip.
Now add a big swooping wave at the end.
Practice it {count} times in a row with {friend}.
Speed it up! Now even faster!
Final round: do it perfectly slow and serious.
{friend} declares the handshake official. Top secret!
{guide_mentor} sits cross-legged in {room}. Welcome to gentle yoga.
Pick the first pose.
Tuck your {body_part} in close. Hold for {count} slow breaths.
Stretch tall and roar quietly through your nose.
Wiggle every {body_part} you can. Soft and floppy.
Now flow into a tall tree pose with arms up.
Rest one hand on your chest. Feel it rise and fall.
Whisper goodnight to {toy}. Yoga complete.
{quest_giver} hands you a tiny message rolled into a {prop}.
You must {action_verb} across {room} without dropping it.
Choose your route.
You leap with {count} brave hops.
You shimmy through, {body_part} first.
Each rug-stone wobbles but you stay upright.
Deliver the message to the far corner of {room}.
{quest_giver} unrolls it and gasps. Mission complete!
{quest_giver} flips open a notebook. What shall we invent today?
Sketch it on the air with your {body_part}. Add {count} buttons.
Place an invisible hat on {quest_giver}'s head and tighten the strap.
Fluff a pillow and hum a soft tune into it.
Now build a working prototype using whatever is in {room}.
Test it carefully. Does it work?
{quest_giver} declares the patent yours. Invention named and signed!
{guide_mentor} stretches both arms wide. The wake-up parade begins in {room}!
March in place lifting your knees high. {count} big steps.
Wiggle every {body_part} you can name out loud.
Grab a {prop} and use it as a parade banner.
Ready for the grand finale?

choices.label: A loud cheer to the ceiling

steps.text: Stop mid-pose and hold it! {toy} cracks up. Day officially started.
HOORAY! {guide_mentor} echoes back. The morning belongs to you.
{guide_mentor} hands you a clipboard. You are today's zookeeper of {room}.
Pick which exhibit to visit first.
Waddle close on stiff legs. Feed them an imaginary fish from your {body_part}.
Bow low and offer a {prop} as a gentle gift.
Stretch tall on tiptoe to greet them at eye level.
Note {count} interesting things in your zookeeper journal.
Tour the rest of the zoo at a slow stroll.
{guide_mentor} signs your zookeeper badge. You earned it!
{friend} cups an imaginary seed in its tiny paws.
Find a soft spot in {room} to plant it.
Pat the ground with your {body_part} and whisper a wish.
Water it with a pretend {prop}.
What kind of plant grows up?
It grows tall and sparkles softly above you. {friend} picks one fruit and shares it.
It blooms and hums you both calm. {friend} closes its eyes happily.
{helper_townsperson} flips a switch on an imaginary control board. We are LIVE from {room}.
Pick the show format.
Hold a {prop} as the microphone and tell a creepy {adjective} tale.
Hold a {prop} as the microphone and tell {count} silly jokes.
Hold a {prop} as the microphone and read in a soft slow voice.
A caller dials in! {helper_townsperson} pretends to be a fan from far away.
Sign off with your station's catchphrase.
{sidekick} hits play on an invisible speaker.
Dance like nobody is watching!
Hold absolutely still. {sidekick} pokes you to test. You win!
Wobble in place all floppy. {sidekick} cracks up.
Sit face to face with {friend} in {room}.
Choose your tactic.
Lock eyes for {count} long seconds. {friend} blinks first!
Twitch your nose just a little. {friend} loses it. Victory!
{quest_giver} announces: draw something {adjective} in 10 seconds!

choices.label: Use your finger in the air
Mime it with your whole body

steps.text: Trace it big and bold. {quest_giver} guesses on the first try!
You wiggle and pose. {quest_giver} squeals the right answer.
Stand tall. {friend} holds up a paw.
Pick the high-five style.
Three gentle taps. {friend} smiles big.
Three slaps in a blur! {friend}'s paw is buzzing.
{trickster} grabs the nearest {prop}.
Give it a name on the spot!
{trickster} bows to Lord or Lady {prop}. Knighted at once!
{trickster} can barely say it without giggling. Perfect!
{quest_giver} unrolls blueprints in {room}. Today we build a castle!
Gather {count} pillows for the walls.
Stack them carefully into a tall fortress.
Add a {prop} on top as the royal flag.
{quest_giver} takes the throne. The kingdom is yours.
Suddenly invaders arrive! Pick your defense.
Toss a soft cushion gently across the room. Direct hit!
Wave your arms in a wide circle. The shield holds strong.
Offer pretend cookies. The invaders sit down and chat.
Peace returns to the castle. {quest_giver} declares you Defender Royal.
Hold a small parade through the great hall.
Settle in for a quiet rest in your fortress.
{guide_mentor} pulls on tiny binoculars. Safari day in {room} begins!
Pack your safari kit: a {prop}, a snack, and courage.
Set out across the great savanna (rug).
Spot tracks! Tiny prints lead under the chair.
Follow them quietly without crunching the grass.
You spot a watering hole. Pick a hide.
Crouch low with {guide_mentor}. Animals begin gathering.
Climb up high. The view is incredible!
You watch {count} imaginary creatures drink and play.
{guide_mentor} taps your {body_part} — a rare animal appears!
Note its features in your safari journal (out loud).
Trek back to camp. {guide_mentor} declares the day legendary.
{quest_giver} hands you a {prop} — the time-machine controller.
Pick where to travel first.
ROAR! Tromp around with heavy steps. Spot {count} dinos.
Robots zip past in flying cars. Wave to one.
Climb the rigging and shout 'land ho!' from the crow's nest.
The machine shudders. A glitch sends you somewhere new!
You land in a {adjective} land you have never seen.
Explore for {count} minutes, narrating everything.
Find a clue that helps you set the dial home.
{quest_giver} pulls the lever. Whoosh — back to {room}!
Write the date and place in the captain's log.
{helper_townsperson} ties on an apron in {room}. The bakery opens today!
Set up the counter using a {prop} as the cash register.
Mix imaginary dough by punching the air {count} times.
Roll it flat and shape it into your specialty.
Slide the tray into the oven. Wait, peek, wait!
DING! Pull it out steaming. What did you bake?
Frost each one carefully with your {body_part} as a piping tool.
Sprinkle imaginary salt across the top. Crunchy!
Open the doors. The first customer is {helper_townsperson}.
Serve with a flourish and a thank-you.
{helper_townsperson} tastes it and gives you a gold-star review.
Flip the sign to CLOSED. Wipe down the counter. Bakery day done.
{guide_mentor} captains the ship. {room} is now the open sea.
Hoist the sail using a {prop} for a flag.
Cast off! Wave goodbye to the harbor.
Day {count}: spot a strange shape in the water.
Pull out the spyglass made from your {body_part}.
It's a sea monster! Friend or foe?
It hums along and escorts you {count} more days.
It munches happily and waves a tentacle goodbye.
A new harbor appears at dawn. Drop anchor!
Step ashore and plant your flag in the sand.
{guide_mentor} writes your name in the captain's logbook.
{friend} declares {room} a snowy mountain pass.
Pile {count} blankets into a fluffy snowdrift.
Carve a doorway and crawl inside.
Place a {prop} as the warming lantern.
A blizzard howls outside. Pick what to do.
Your story ends with snow turning to stars. {friend} is wide-eyed and snug.
You sip slowly and the storm fades. Warm and {adjective} inside.

templates.title: Write a letter to your future self

steps.text: {friend} hands you an invisible pen and tiny envelope.
Think about one thing you are proud of today.
Say it out loud as if writing it down.
Add a wish for tomorrow.
Now seal the letter. How?
{friend} files it in the secret time-vault. See you next year, you!
{friend} promises to deliver it on a future day. Off it goes.

templates.title: Open a stall at the market

steps.text: {helper_townsperson} unfolds a tiny tablecloth in {room}. Market day!
Pick what your stall sells.
Line up {count} pretend bottles, each a different color.
Stack {count} silly hats on top of each other.
Arrange {count} small stones in a neat row.
{helper_townsperson} approaches as your first customer.
Make your sales pitch with great drama.
{helper_townsperson} pays in pretend coins and walks off thrilled.
{quest_giver} surveys the course in {room}.
Pick your obstacle for hole one.
Roll a soft {prop} carefully through.
Tap it gently up and around.
Hole two: {action_verb} the ball with your {body_part} as the club.
Sink the final putt with a flourish.
{quest_giver} hands you a tiny gold trophy.
{guide_mentor} aims an imaginary telescope through the {room} ceiling.
Spot {count} bright stars and name each one.
A comet streaks past!
Quickly: pick what to record.
You trace the {adjective} arc on a paper sky. {guide_mentor} files it in the archive.
Your hum rises and falls with the comet. {guide_mentor} taps along, dreamy.
{friend} stands at attention. Today we found a club!
Pick the club's theme.
Lay out {count} socks. The collection begins.
Lie on your back and describe {count} cloud shapes.
Whisper {count} secrets only the club may know.
Now invent the secret club handshake.
Shake on it. The club is official.
{guide_mentor} dims the lights. Tonight we build a dream.
Pick the setting.
Paint flowers in your mind that grow from {prop}s.
Picture warm windows and a cat curled on a {prop}.
Add {count} more {adjective} details that only you can see.
Lie back and step inside the dream.
{guide_mentor} closes its eyes too. Goodnight, dream-builder.
{quest_giver} hits a giant red button. The factory in {room} powers up!
Pick the toy line for today.
Roll {count} pretend balls down the conveyor belt.
Click together {count} pretend robots on the assembly line.
Stuff {count} pretend plushies with imaginary fluff.
Inspect each one with a serious squint.
Stamp APPROVED with your {body_part}.
{quest_giver} declares the shift over. Whew!

templates.title: Pick a quest from the board

steps.text: {quest_giver} taps a tiny notice board in {room}. Quests await!
Choose your mission.
Search every corner. Use your sharpest looking eyes.
Approach slowly. Whisper {count} kind words.
Climb the cushion summit. Plant your flag.
Quest complete! {quest_giver} stamps your hero passport.
Return to the board. Pick tomorrow's quest in your head.
{trickster} sniffs the air. A storm is rolling into {room}!
Make rain by tapping {count} fingertips on a {prop}.
Add wind by whooshing softly with your mouth.
Now the lightning! Flash a hand up and freeze.
Ready for the thunder?
BOOM! The whole storm cracks at once. {trickster} jumps and laughs.
A long low rumble fills the room. {toy} listens with eyes wide.
{guide_mentor} points to a thin line of moonlight crossing {room}. 'That,' they whisper, 'is a moon-path. Will you follow it?'
Step only where the moon shines. {action_verb} from glow to glow.
Hold up a {prop} — it catches the light and shimmers.
{guide_mentor} walks with you, naming the {adjective} shapes the light makes.
The moon-path forks. {guide_mentor} asks: do you follow the bright branch or the dim one?
The bright path leads to a sill full of stars. {guide_mentor} says you're a real moon-tracker now.
The dim path opens onto a hush of shadows where {guide_mentor} teaches you the names of three quiet stars.
{quest_giver} hands you a paper compass rose drawn on a {prop}. 'Today,' they say, 'we map our own home.'
Find true north — the wall the sun touches in the morning.
Mark south with a {count}-step pace from where you stand.
{quest_giver} traces east and west and adds tiny landmarks: the lamp, the rug.
{quest_giver} declares your map officially {adjective}. You sign the bottom corner like a real explorer.

templates.title: The case of the lost sock

steps.text: {quest_giver} bursts in with terrible news: one {adjective} sock is missing from the entire kingdom of {room}.
Check three suspect spots: under the couch, behind the door, inside a shoe.
Pick up any {prop} you find on the way — clues only.
{quest_giver} examines each clue and hums very seriously.
{quest_giver} narrows it down to two final places. Where do we check first?
Aha! The sock was hiding under the basket the whole time. {quest_giver} gives you the title Sock Detective.
The dryer reveals the sock napping with two others. {quest_giver} reunites the family with a tiny ceremony.
{guide_mentor} pulls out a long {adjective} ribbon and says: 'This is our trail today.'
Lay the ribbon across the floor in a curving path.
Tippy-toe along the ribbon without stepping off.
{guide_mentor} sets a {prop} at the halfway point as a checkpoint.
{action_verb} the last few steps of the trail.
Reach the end and turn around — the trail looks different going back.
{guide_mentor} gives you a tiny imaginary medal. You are a Ribbon-Trail Champion.
{quest_giver} pulls back the couch cushions and gasps: 'A tunnel! It must lead somewhere {adjective}.'
Crawl in slowly — count {count} steps as you go.
Reach out and feel the {prop} {quest_giver} has hidden along the way.
{quest_giver} whispers that there is a fork ahead.
{quest_giver} asks: which tunnel branch — the one toward the lamp or the one toward the window?
The lamp tunnel ends at a warm glowing chamber. {quest_giver} declares it the throne room.
The window tunnel opens onto a balcony of sky. {quest_giver} salutes the clouds with you.
{guide_mentor} unfolds an imaginary star map across the floor of {room}.
Find a {prop} to use as a telescope.
Lie on your back and search the ceiling for the brightest 'star'.
{guide_mentor} names three constellations: the Spoon, the Cat, and the {adjective} Boat.
{guide_mentor} marks you down as Junior Astronomer for tonight.
{quest_giver} climbs the imaginary ladder to the rooftop and waves you up. 'Scouts report at sundown.'
Survey {room} from above — what's directly below you?
Wave a {prop} as your signal flag.
{quest_giver} hands you binoculars (also imaginary).
{quest_giver} spots two things on the horizon. Which do you report first?
The balloon waves back. {quest_giver} writes you up in the scout log.
The cloud-herd parades past. {quest_giver} salutes the weather and so do you.
{friend} flops down beside you on the rug. 'Today this rug is a raft and the floor is the river.'
Push off from shore with an imaginary pole.
Use a {prop} as the rudder.
{friend} points to a current carrying you toward two destinations.
{friend} asks: paddle to the island or drift to the waterfall?
You beach on a {adjective} island. {friend} plants a flag with you.
The waterfall turns out to be tiny and friendly. {friend} laughs as you both bob over it.
{guide_mentor} taps your shoulder. 'Climb in — our balloon lifts off from {room} at the count of three.'
Hold a {prop} as the lever for the burner.
Wave goodbye to the floor — you're rising.
{guide_mentor} points out a {adjective} mountain in the distance.
{guide_mentor} steers gently and you both float past the mountain singing softly.
{friend} sniffs the air. 'There's wind today. Let's chase it.'
Find a {prop} light enough to flutter.
Hold it up and follow whichever way it tugs.
{friend} runs ahead and the wind swirls between you.
You both stop at a {adjective} spot where the wind rests. {friend} says it chose you.
{guide_mentor} hands you a slim {prop} and says, very seriously, 'This is your practice wand.'
Try a {adjective} flick — wrist loose, eyes soft.
Cast a sparkle on the lamp by saying its name backwards.
{guide_mentor} bows. It is time for your first real spell.
{guide_mentor} asks: which spell first — the lifting one or the lullaby one?
The cushion floats two inches (in your imagination, which is the best place for it). {guide_mentor} applauds.
Every stuffed animal in {room} sighs and settles. {guide_mentor} pronounces you a real soother.
{guide_mentor} blows dust off an imaginary spellbook. 'Three new pages today.'
Page one: collect a {prop} and a soft sound.
Page two: spin in place {count} times for the change-of-mood charm.
{guide_mentor} reads page three aloud — it asks for a smile.
{guide_mentor} closes the book gently. 'All three spells learned. Well done, {guide_mentor} apprentice.'
{guide_mentor} sets out an imaginary cauldron and ladles in moonlight from {room}.
Add a pinch of {adjective} stardust (use a {prop}).
Stir {count} times clockwise while humming.
{guide_mentor} asks: what should the potion do?
The potion fizzes — try a giggle. {guide_mentor} reports it was 30 percent louder.
Your next steps land like clouds. {guide_mentor} cannot hear you even when you try.
Your next hug warms the whole room. {guide_mentor} sighs happily.
{guide_mentor} taps the back of a {prop} and it ripples like water. 'Step through, but only for a moment.'
On the other side, everything is the same but {adjective}.
Wave at your mirror-self — wave back.
{guide_mentor} reminds you the way home is whichever direction feels warm.
{guide_mentor} asks: shake your mirror-self's hand, or trade riddles?
Your mirror-self gives a firm shake, then bows. {guide_mentor} ushers you back through.
The riddle is silly — both of you laugh. {guide_mentor} pulls you home grinning.
{helper_townsperson} points at a tiny circle on the rug. 'A fairy ring formed here last night.'
Walk around it {count} times — never step inside.
Leave a {prop} as a polite gift.
{helper_townsperson} listens and reports that the fairies seem {adjective} today.
{helper_townsperson} says the fairies left a thank-you you can only feel: a little extra calm.
{quest_giver} hands you an imaginary net. 'Tonight we collect stars from the ceiling of {room}.'
Sweep gently — never grab.
Place a caught star carefully into a {prop}.
{quest_giver} counts: how many {adjective} stars did you collect?
{quest_giver} asks: release them now or save one for a wish?
The stars float home. {quest_giver} says the sky thanks you with extra twinkle tonight.
You whisper a wish into the saved star. {quest_giver} promises not to peek.
{trickster} winks at you. 'Today I'll teach you my favorite trick. Pick a creature.'
Stand tall and wiggle your shoulders to begin.
Whisper the creature's name into your {prop}.
{trickster} asks: shift into which one?
You lumber four steps. {trickster} cackles and joins you in bear-walking.
You spread your arms and glide. {trickster} flaps along behind you.
You wiggle along the floor. {trickster} flops down beside you and they wiggle too.
{helper_townsperson} points to a corner of {room}. 'This is the wish-well today.'
Find a small {prop} to drop as your wishing-coin.
Whisper a {adjective} wish before you drop it.
{helper_townsperson} listens with their hand on their heart.
{helper_townsperson} says the well took the wish kindly. Now it's time to play and trust.
{helper_townsperson} kneels by a plant. 'It looks thirsty. Help me cast the rain-charm.'
Wiggle your fingers like falling drops above the leaves.
Hum a {adjective} drizzle-tune.
{helper_townsperson} fetches the real water in a {prop}.
{helper_townsperson} thanks you and the plant. The charm worked because both of you cared.
{guide_mentor} sets out three small {prop}-like objects on the floor.
Pick the one that feels most like 'you' today.
Hold it tight and breathe in slowly.
{guide_mentor} traces a tiny circle around it with a fingertip.
Whisper one good thing about yourself to the talisman.
Tuck it into a safe place — a pocket, a shelf, a windowsill.
{guide_mentor} declares the talisman charged. It will quietly help all day.
{helper_townsperson} kneels by a window and waves you over. 'Look — an ant parade.'
Count {count} ants without losing track.
Trace their path with a finger (don't touch them).
{helper_townsperson} guesses where they're heading — maybe a {adjective} picnic.
{helper_townsperson} thanks the ants for the show with a {prop}-tap on the sill.
{guide_mentor} hushes you gently. 'Close your eyes. Tell me how many bird voices you can hear.'
Cup your ears with a {prop} to listen harder.
Count {count} different songs.
{guide_mentor} picks one and whistles it back, {adjective} and clear.
{guide_mentor} writes down a name for the new bird you both invented together.
{friend} sets up a tiny picnic on the floor for all the stuffed puppies in {room}.
Lay out {count} pretend plates.
Use a {prop} as the serving bowl.
{friend} asks the puppies what they'd like today.
{friend} narrows it down — serve which course first?
The puppies devour the sandwiches with polite barks. {friend} pours tea.
The cookies disappear in seconds. {friend} bakes more in an imaginary oven.
{helper_townsperson} bows formally to the (imaginary) cat sitting on the chair. 'You go first.'
Approach slowly, no sudden moves.
Offer a {prop} as a peace gift.
Wait for the cat's {adjective} blink — that's the cat's yes.
{helper_townsperson} declares friendship official. The cat purrs (in your head).
{trickster} announces the slowest race in history. 'Whoever crosses {room} last, wins.'
Step with the slowness of a tortoise carrying a {prop}.
Stop every {count} steps to think about the next one.
{trickster} cheers (very quietly) for everyone's {adjective} patience.
{trickster} crowns whoever reached the wall last. Probably everyone, eventually.
{guide_mentor} adjusts an imaginary feather cap. 'I work the owl shift. Want to join me?'
Practice your hoot — soft and {adjective}.
Carry a {prop} as your lantern.
Swivel your head slowly like an owl. Check three corners of {room}.
{guide_mentor} reports all clear. Bedtime soon, fellow owl.
{frenemy} grins and crouches low. 'Best frog wins. I'm doing my warmups now.'
Crouch, hands on the floor, ready.
Spring forward {count} short hops.
{frenemy} measures with a {prop} (very seriously).
{frenemy} asks: best of three jumps or longest single jump?
Three rounds later, the {adjective} winner is declared. {frenemy} demands a rematch tomorrow.
One huge jump settles it. {frenemy} insists you both deserve gold medals.
{quest_giver} adjusts an imaginary hat. 'Wild horses got loose in {room}. We round 'em up.'
Find a {prop} to use as your lasso.
{action_verb} after the first horse — corner it gently.
{quest_giver} closes the gate behind you.
Count: how many horses still loose? {count}.
Two more to go — herd them softly past the rug.
{quest_giver} tips their hat. 'A fine {adjective} round-up, partner.'
{friend} waves you over to an imaginary tide pool drawn on the rug.
Reach in slowly with a {prop} as a hello-arm.
The octopus has {count} arms — match it limb for limb.
{friend} introduces you formally and {adjective}.
{friend} says the octopus blushed pink. That means it likes you.
{helper_townsperson} hands you a clipboard (well, a {prop}). 'Survey the bee garden. Calm and careful.'
Watch one bee for {count} seconds without moving.
Note its favorite flower — the {adjective} one.
{helper_townsperson} thanks the bees with a tiny bow.
{helper_townsperson} writes you up as Junior Bee Ambassador.
{sidekick} drops onto the floor with siren noises. 'Climb aboard the fire engine, partner.'
Steer with a {prop} as the wheel.
Wail your siren around the loop of {room}.
{sidekick} radios in a {adjective} report.
{sidekick} asks: rescue a tree-stuck cat or wash down a smoky chimney?
Cat saved. {sidekick} hands you a tiny medal cut from foil.
Chimney sparkles. {sidekick} hands you a tiny medal cut from foil.
{guide_mentor} closes the imaginary hatch. 'Submarine dive in three, two, one. Hold tight.'
Pump the {prop} to fill the ballast tank.
Read the depth gauge — {count} fathoms down.
{guide_mentor} spots a {adjective} fish through the porthole.
{guide_mentor} surfaces the sub gently. 'Smooth dive, captain.'
{friend} hops on an imaginary scooter beside you. 'Race once around the lamp?'
Kick off and {action_verb} the first lap.
Honk an imaginary horn — {count} short toots.
{friend} cheers as you take the final {adjective} corner.
{friend} announces a tie. 'Same time, same place tomorrow?'
{quest_giver} hands you a launch checklist (it's just a {prop}). 'Today we lift off.'
Press the imaginary {adjective} ignition button.
Count down from {count}: hold tight as the engines roar.
{quest_giver} reports altitude every two seconds.
{quest_giver} asks: orbit the moon or land on a tiny asteroid?
You loop the moon twice and wave at the craters. {quest_giver} salutes.
You touch down on a friendly asteroid. {quest_giver} plants a flag with you.
{helper_townsperson} clangs an imaginary bell. 'Trolley leaving now! All aboard.'
Pick a route — {count} stops total.
Ring the {prop} at each stop.
{helper_townsperson} announces stop names: Cushion Square, Lamp Junction, {adjective} Plaza.
Pick up an imaginary passenger at stop three.
Wave at the conductor (yourself).
{helper_townsperson} parks the trolley back at the garage. 'On time. Excellent driving.'
{quest_giver} thrusts an envelope into your hand. 'Urgent delivery. {adjective} route only.'
Mount the imaginary bike. {action_verb} for momentum.
Tuck the {prop} into your bag.
{quest_giver} radios two possible routes.
{quest_giver} asks: the hill route (faster) or the river route (prettier)?
You crest the hill in record time. {quest_giver} signs the receipt with a flourish.
The river path is calm and lovely. {quest_giver} insists this was the right call.
{helper_townsperson} ties an imaginary rope to a {prop}. 'You're the tugboat today. I'm the freighter.'
Pull steady — small steps.
Toot the horn {count} times to warn other ships.
{helper_townsperson} hums a {adjective} sea-song to keep time.
{helper_townsperson} thanks the tugboat for safe passage to port.
{guide_mentor} points up. 'See that {adjective} track? Our monorail leaves from {room} at three.'
Punch your own ticket with a {prop}.
Lean into the {count}th turn — windows full of sky.
{guide_mentor} narrates a passing cloud-station.
{guide_mentor} hands you the final stop sign. You've arrived in good time.
{trickster} drops onto an imaginary board. 'I'm the coach. You're the rookie. Today: very slow tricks.'
Push off in slow motion across {room}.
Try the {adjective} ollie — one small hop with both feet.
{trickster} marks your form with a {prop} as a clipboard.
{trickster} asks: try a spin or a grind next?
You spin so slowly it looks like floating. {trickster} is impressed.
You grind a pretend rail for {count} whole seconds. {trickster} bows.
{helper_townsperson} hands you a tractor wheel (a {prop} works). 'Three fields to plow before lunch.'
Start the engine — {count} cranks.
{action_verb} the first row.
{helper_townsperson} hauls hay in the back.
Pause to wave at the {adjective} cows.
Plow the last field in neat lines.
{helper_townsperson} parks the tractor and rings the lunch bell. Well done, farmer.
{friend} sets up a pot on the floor of {room}. 'Stew tonight. You're the chef.'
Add a pinch of {adjective} pepper from a {prop}.
Stir clockwise {count} times.
{friend} tastes and pretends to swoon.
{friend} ladles out tiny invisible bowls for the whole stuffed-animal village.
{helper_townsperson} sets up a stall by the window. 'Welcome to the {adjective} fruit market.'
Display the fruit on a {prop} as the counter.
Call out: '{count} apples for a smile!'
{helper_townsperson} sends customers your way (stuffed animals count).
{helper_townsperson} declares it a sold-out day. Free juice for the staff.
{friend} sets the table with imaginary cups for everyone in {room}.
Pour from a {prop} as the teapot.
Offer {count} sugar cubes per cup.
{friend} suggests a tiny topic to chat about.
{friend} asks: which topic — favorite weather or favorite sound?
Everyone agrees {adjective} drizzle is best. {friend} writes it down for posterity.
Birdsong wins by one vote. {friend} hums in agreement.
{trickster} ties on an imaginary apron. 'Today is the {adjective} pancake-flip championship.'
Hold a {prop} as your skillet.
Practice {count} careful flips first.
{trickster} judges form, not distance.
{trickster} asks: highest flip or most flips in a row?
Your flip nearly touches the ceiling (in your head). {trickster} cheers.
Six flips in a row! {trickster} declares you a pancake-flip master.
{friend} crouches by the rug. 'See all those {adjective} berries? Pick the ripe ones only.'
Drop each one into a {prop} as your basket.
Count to {count} — that's our quota.
{friend} taste-tests one and smiles.
{friend} carries the basket home and promises pie tomorrow.
{guide_mentor} hands you an apron. 'Welcome to your first day at the sandwich shop.'
Lay out the bread on a {prop}.
Add a layer of pretend {adjective} cheese.
Tomato or no tomato? {guide_mentor} likes tomato.
Slice diagonally — exactly {count} cuts.
Wrap it in a napkin with a tiny flourish.
{guide_mentor} sells it to the first customer. 'You're a natural.'
{helper_townsperson} pins a tiny badge on you. 'Official noodle-tester, reporting today.'
Taste-test bowl one — pretend it's {adjective}.
Rate it on a {prop} from 1 to {count}.
{helper_townsperson} writes down your scores in a serious notebook.
{helper_townsperson} declares the day's winner. A noodle has been honored.
{helper_townsperson} hangs imaginary banners across {room}. 'Festival opens at noon.'
Set up {count} festival booths with pillows.
Carry a {prop} as the parade banner.
Wave at all the {adjective} guests arriving.
Lead the parade once around the lamp.
Distribute imaginary corn cobs to everyone.
{helper_townsperson} closes the festival with a soft cheer. A successful harvest.
{sidekick} hauls a sign to the door. 'Open for business. {adjective} lemonade.'
Squeeze imaginary lemons with a {prop}.
Stir {count} cups at once.
{sidekick} hawks the wares to the hallway.
{sidekick} asks: charge a quarter or charge a song?
Coins clink in. {sidekick} tallies the take: a lot of pretend money.
Songs flood the corridor. {sidekick} sings along and declares profit immeasurable.
{helper_townsperson} hits play on an imaginary jingle. 'Truck is rolling. Hop in.'
Steer with a {prop} as the wheel.
Stop at {count} houses on the route.
Serve {adjective} cones to every kid in {room}.
{helper_townsperson} parks the truck back home. Last cone is for you.
{quest_giver} shades their eyes from an imaginary horizon. 'Our crew needs signaling.'
Build three pretend fires (use pillows).
Wave a {prop} as a flag overhead.
{quest_giver} listens for an answering call.
{quest_giver} asks: signal 'all clear' or 'come quick'?
Distant ships answer back in three slow waves. {quest_giver} salutes.
Distant ships speed your way. {quest_giver} prepares the welcome.
{quest_giver} unrolls a wrinkled treasure map across {room}.
Take {count} paces north — gentle steps only.
Mark the spot with a {prop}.
{quest_giver} squints at the map and traces the {adjective} ink with a fingertip.
{quest_giver} asks: dig now, or check the back of the map first?
You scoop pretend sand for thirty seconds — a chest! {quest_giver} cracks it open: pretend pearls inside, plus a note thanking you.
The map back has a riddle. It points two steps east. {quest_giver} laughs and you both find the real chest.
{sidekick} hands you a mop (or a {prop} that looks like one).
Sweep the {adjective} deck of {room} in long arcs.
Stop every {count} sweeps to wipe your brow.
{sidekick} sings a sea shanty under their breath.
{sidekick} declares the deck spotless. 'Captain'll be proud.'
{guide_mentor} kneels and pats the floor. 'Today I train you as my squire.'
Polish the helmet — use a {prop}.
Saddle the (imaginary) horse with three taps.
{guide_mentor} recites the {adjective} oath of squires.
Practice the salute — slow and steady.
Carry the {count} lances to the practice yard.
{guide_mentor} pronounces you ready for tomorrow's tournament.
{quest_giver} arrives in pretend armor. 'You and I joust at the cushion-fence.'
Mount up — your horse is the rug.
Lower the {adjective} lance ({prop}).
{quest_giver} signals the charge.
{quest_giver} asks: charge full-speed or wait for the cue?
You score the {count} points on the spot. {quest_giver} concedes graciously.
Patience wins the bout. {quest_giver} bows and offers you the laurel.
{guide_mentor} surveys the imaginary moat at the edge of {room}.
Test the drawbridge — a {prop} held flat.
Step across in {count} slow paces.
{guide_mentor} watches for the moat creature (it's friendly today).
{guide_mentor} drops the drawbridge behind you. 'The castle is safe.'
{guide_mentor} hands you a long apron. 'Today: feast prep for the king.'
Knead the imaginary dough with a {prop}.
Add {adjective} herbs from the windowsill.
Stoke the (pretend) oven with {count} logs.
{guide_mentor} times you on rolling out twelve pastries.
Plate everything fancy.
{guide_mentor} carries the feast to the (imaginary) throne room. The king will be pleased.
{guide_mentor} climbs an imaginary spiral staircase. 'Watch duty before breakfast.'
Scan the horizon with a {prop}.
Note the {adjective} clouds rolling in.
Count {count} merchant carts on the road below.
{guide_mentor} rings the all-clear bell. 'Watchful eyes, watchful kingdom.'
{guide_mentor} hands you a shield (it's a {prop}). 'Three drills, then break.'
Block left {count} times.
Block right the same.
{guide_mentor} signals the {adjective} crouch-and-cover.
{guide_mentor} thumps your shield in approval. Drills passed.
{trickster} pulls a wrinkled scrap from their pocket. 'The captain's stew recipe. Top secret.'
Gather pretend ingredients into a {prop}.
Add {count} pinches of {adjective} sea-salt.
{trickster} stirs and chuckles.
{trickster} asks: serve hot at sundown, or cold for breakfast?
The crew lines up at sundown. {trickster} says you'll be promoted to first mate.
Breakfast is a hit. {trickster} pins a sardine medal to your shirt.
{sidekick} climbs an imaginary mast. 'Lookout duty. Up you go.'
Use a {prop} as the spyglass.
Spot a {adjective} ship on the horizon.
Call down: '{count} sails, due east!'
{sidekick} thanks you with a friendly shout. The captain heard.
{helper_townsperson} hands you the drawbridge lever (it's a {prop}).
Watch for travelers crossing the moat.
Raise the bridge {count} times to test it.
{helper_townsperson} approves your {adjective} timing.
{helper_townsperson} stamps your shift card. Keeper's day complete.
{guide_mentor} bursts in: 'The kraken's surfacing. It just needs a soothing.'
Whisper a {adjective} sea-lullaby.
Wave a {prop} like a slow ribbon underwater.
{guide_mentor} confirms the kraken is listening.
{guide_mentor} asks: hum a tune or tell a tiny story?
Your humming drifts down. The kraken sinks back, calm and content.
Your story works wonders. The kraken sleeps with a smile (somewhere).

templates.title: Sealing the vault with a song

steps.text: {guide_mentor} taps the lid of an imaginary chest. 'A song seals this one. Three verses.'
Hum a {adjective} pirate tune.
Tap the lid {count} times with a {prop}.
{guide_mentor} pronounces the chest sealed.
{guide_mentor} hides the chest where only kind people will find it.
{guide_mentor} kneels solemnly on the rug. 'Today you take the {adjective} oath.'
Hold a {prop} as the ceremonial sword.
Repeat after {guide_mentor}: 'I will be kind, brave, and {adjective}.'
Bow {count} times.
{guide_mentor} rises and declares you a knight. The kingdom is in good hands.
{sidekick} grabs two wooden spoons. 'You on the pots, me on the bowls.'
Lay out {count} pots like a drum kit.
Add a {prop} for the hi-hat.
{sidekick} counts off — '{adjective} one, two, three, four!'
{sidekick} asks: fast tempo or slow?
Drumming gets wild. {sidekick} laughs and signals the big finish.
A steady beat fills the room. {sidekick} nods like a real conductor.
{guide_mentor} sits cross-legged. 'Today we hum, not sing.'
Pick a {adjective} note and hold it.
Hum for {count} slow breaths.
Add a {prop} hum-buzz on top.
{guide_mentor} bows — the choir's first concert was perfect.
{guide_mentor} sets a {count}-minute timer. 'Make a song. Any song.'
Pick a {adjective} subject — clouds, cats, lamps.
Use a {prop} as your microphone.
{guide_mentor} listens with serious attention.
{guide_mentor} claps three times. 'A hit. Submit it to the radio later.'
{friend} claps a quick pattern. 'Match it and add one of your own.'
Listen carefully — {count} beats.
Tap a {prop} as your extra instrument.
{friend} hands the rhythm back, longer this time.
{friend} asks: keep adding or switch instruments?
The rhythm reaches a {adjective} length. {friend} declares it the longest claps yet.
You both swap and the music gets giggly. {friend} loves it.
{trickster} holds up a {prop}. 'I bet this can be an instrument.'
Blow gently across the top — listen for a {adjective} tone.
Try {count} different mouth-shapes.
{trickster} declares the best one official.
{trickster} names the new instrument together with you. It's now a real thing.
{guide_mentor} dims an imaginary lamp. 'Tonight we invent a lullaby that works on dragons.'
Pick a slow note from the {adjective} scale.
Hum it for {count} breaths.
{guide_mentor} adds a soft tap on a {prop}.
Layer in a humming friend (anyone in the room).
Test the lullaby on a tired stuffed animal.
{guide_mentor} pronounces it dragon-grade. Sleep follows.
{helper_townsperson} hauls in pretend speakers. 'Show in {count} minutes.'
Lay out a {prop} as the stage.
Test the {adjective} microphone.
{helper_townsperson} adjusts the lighting (curtains).
{helper_townsperson} cues you for the opening number. The crowd (stuffed animals) cheers.
{guide_mentor} cups their ear. 'There's an echo somewhere in this room. Find it.'
Clap once in {count} different corners.
Hold a {prop} up to amplify the sound.
{guide_mentor} notes which corner answers back loudest.
{guide_mentor} marks it 'echo HQ' with a tiny imaginary plaque.
{guide_mentor} sets up imaginary cages. 'Welcome to the instrument zoo.'
Visit the drum (loud and {adjective}).
Visit the flute (small and silvery).
Knock on a {prop} as the next exhibit.
{guide_mentor} feeds each instrument an imaginary snack.
Count: {count} instruments seen.
{guide_mentor} closes the zoo for the day. 'Same time tomorrow.'
{needs_saving} curls up on the rug. 'I'm a songdog today. I only listen to {adjective} singing.'
Hum a soft tune for {count} breaths.
Stroke a {prop} as you sing.
{needs_saving} (the songdog) thumps an imaginary tail.
{needs_saving} declares your voice 'songdog-approved'. Tail wags forever.
{trickster} leans backwards over a chair. 'For one minute, everything is upside down.'
Walk in slow {adjective} reverse-steps.
Say {count} words backwards.
{trickster} holds a {prop} upside down for emphasis.
{trickster} flips the rule back. Right-side up resumes.
{guide_mentor} puts a finger to their lips. 'Whisper-only for {count} steps.'
Whisper your name like a {adjective} secret.
Pass a {prop} silently to someone (or to yourself).
{guide_mentor} mouths the next instruction — no sound.
{guide_mentor} ends the whisper game. 'You held it perfectly.'
{friend} stands across from you. 'You move, I copy. Then we switch.'
Try {count} small moves first — head, hand, foot.
Toss in a {adjective} surprise pose.
{friend} laughs and the room warms up.
{friend} asks: trade leads or freeze?

choices.label: Freeze on the count of three

steps.text: {friend} leads now. You match every wobble perfectly.
Both of you freeze mid-pose. {friend} cracks first. Game over, both giggling.
{helper_townsperson} surveys the shoe pile. 'Big project today.'
Gather the shoes from {room} into one heap.
Sort by {adjective} size — small to big.
Count to {count} as a milestone.
{helper_townsperson} stands back. 'Best-organized shoes in the kingdom.'

templates.title: Name the color, name the feeling

steps.text: {guide_mentor} points at three things in {room}. 'Tell me their colors.'
Pick a {prop} and name its color first.
Then name a {adjective} feeling that goes with that color.
{guide_mentor} matches each color with a feeling too. Do {count} pairs.
{guide_mentor} writes the pairings down for later. 'Today's color-feelings are saved.'
{trickster} pulls a book off the shelf. 'Balance it on your head. Walk three loops.'
Steady the book with one hand at first.
Walk {count} careful steps.
Trade the book for a {prop} — harder mode.
{trickster} crowns you the {adjective} balance champion.
{trickster} grins. 'Opposite day, but only for five minutes. Yes means no, up means down.'
Try {count} sentences flipped backwards.
Pick a {adjective} word and use it to mean its opposite.
{trickster} tests you with a question.
{trickster} asks: 'do you like cake?' (remember — opposite day)
{trickster} bursts out laughing. You passed. Cake is coming.
{trickster} pretends to be sad. No cake (which on opposite day means cake).
{trickster} pulls a sock onto their hand. 'Welcome to the {adjective} sock-puppet variety show.'
Cast two puppets — one bossy, one shy.
Hand each a {prop} as a prop.
{trickster} narrates the opening line.
{trickster} asks: comedy or mystery?
The audience (stuffed animals) howls. {trickster} calls for an encore.
The mystery is solved by puppet number {count}. {trickster} bows the puppets off.
{guide_mentor} stretches and yawns. 'The slowest walk you can manage. From wall to wall.'
Lift your foot in slow motion.
Hold a {prop} so it doesn't tip.
Count the steps to {count}.
{guide_mentor} declares your finish time {adjective}. Naps are next.
{helper_townsperson} bows to the lamp. 'It deserves a proper introduction.'
Approach with a {prop} as a calling card.
Recite a {adjective} title for yourself.
Bow {count} times.
{helper_townsperson} declares the lamp pleased. The room feels fancier.
{helper_townsperson} ushers you up onto an imaginary stage by the window.
Address the curtains as the audience.
Make a {adjective} speech that's exactly {count} sentences long.
Hold a {prop} as your podium.
{helper_townsperson} applauds. The curtains rustle politely.
{trickster} tunes an imaginary radio. 'You're on the air in five.'
Hold a {prop} as the microphone.
Lead with a {adjective} breaking story.
{trickster} cues you for the weather.
{trickster} asks: forecast {count} sunny days or one storm?
Listeners (stuffed animals) celebrate. {trickster} signs off the broadcast.
Storm warnings issued. {trickster} jokes that the storm is mostly wind.
{guide_mentor} furrows their brow. 'I had a great word. Lost it. Help me find it.'
Suggest {count} candidate words.
Hold up a {prop} for each one ('like this?').
{guide_mentor} hums no, no, no, then suddenly: 'Yes! That's it!'
{guide_mentor} writes the word down so it can't escape again.
{frenemy} unfurls an imaginary banner. 'The tiny olympics start now.'
Three events: hop, balance, throw.
Use a {prop} for the throwing event.
{frenemy} asks: which event first?
Hopping is wild. {frenemy} declares a tie.
The balance pose is a {adjective} statue. {frenemy} bows.
The toss lands perfectly. {frenemy} declares both of you champions.

templates.title: Acting like a very polite android

steps.text: {trickster} stiffens up. 'Beep. I am polite robot. You join?'
Move in {adjective} joint-jerks across {room}.
Hold a {prop} as your antenna.
Say 'please' and 'thank you' {count} times.
{trickster} unfreezes. 'Best polite-robot day ever.'
{friend} drags a blanket across {room}. 'Cozy corner time. You pick the spot.'
Stack {count} cushions for the wall.
Add a {prop} for company.
{friend} crawls in and pats the {adjective} floor.
{friend} says it's the best corner in the whole house. Stay as long as you want.
{friend} sits beside you and breathes slowly. 'How's your weather inside today?'
Pick a {adjective} word for your mood.
Say it out loud {count} times.
{friend} shares theirs too (use a {prop} as the talking stick).
{friend} thanks you for being honest. Friendship topped up.
{helper_townsperson} sets out imaginary cards. 'One for every stuffed animal in {room}.'
Pick the {adjective} ones first.
Use a {prop} as the pretend pen.
Write a thank-you in {count} short words.
Sign with a smile.
Stack the cards neatly.
{helper_townsperson} delivers them with a tiny bow. Everyone feels seen.
{friend} unfolds a blanket and pats the space next to them.
Pick a {prop} as the story object.
Tell a {count}-line story about it together.
{friend} adds the {adjective} twist.
{friend} thanks you for the story. The blanket is even warmer now.
{guide_mentor} taps the floor. 'Round-robin kindness time. {count} rounds.'
Name one kind thing you saw today.
Pass a {prop} like a baton.
{guide_mentor} adds a kindness of their own — {adjective} and small.
{guide_mentor} closes the round. The room feels a little brighter.

templates.title: Slow walk through a make-believe garden

steps.text: {guide_mentor} pretends to open a tiny gate at the edge of {room}.
Step through and name three {adjective} flowers.
Pick a {prop} as your watering can.
Water {count} imaginary plants.
{guide_mentor} closes the gate behind you. 'Garden visit complete.'
{guide_mentor} sits across from you. 'Today we practice listening — really listening.'
Close your eyes and count {count} sounds.
Hold a {prop} steady to focus.
{guide_mentor} shares a {adjective} sound they noticed.
{guide_mentor} thanks you for the careful ears. Good listener confirmed.

templates.title: Two kind things for each other

steps.text: {friend} crosses their legs and grins. 'Two kind things, you go first.'
Say something {adjective} you noticed about {friend}.
Trade — {friend} says one about you.
Pass a {prop} between you for {count} rounds.
{friend} bows. The kindness account is overflowing.
{friend} drapes blankets across furniture. 'Today we build a castle in {room}.'
Anchor each corner with a cushion.
Use a {prop} as the flagpole.
{friend} hangs an imaginary {adjective} flag.
Welcome {count} guests (any stuffed animals).
Throw a tiny housewarming party.
{friend} declares the castle officially open. Long live the residents.
{guide_mentor} walks slowly around {room}. 'Goodnight to every corner.'
Wave at the {adjective} lamp.
Tap each cushion {count} times — gentle taps.
Whisper goodnight to a {prop}.
{guide_mentor} dims the lights (in your imagination). The room rests.
{helper_townsperson} arrives with a tiny imaginary mailbag — today you deliver to the birds of {room}.
Fold a piece of paper {count} times into a tiny letter.
Tiptoe to the highest perch you can reach — that is the first nest.
{helper_townsperson} chirps: which kind of bird gets the letter?
The sparrow flutters down, takes the letter, and tweets a thank-you so {adjective} you both laugh.
The owl bows once, tucks the letter under its wing, and gives a slow wise blink.
{sidekick} suits up beside you — the moonbase in {room} needs a checkup.
Bounce {count} steps in slow motion to the control panel.
Pick the most {adjective} {prop} — that is your space-radio.
Call mission control with three loud beeps.
{sidekick} reports a strange noise outside the airlock.
It is a friendly moon-rabbit! {sidekick} feeds it imaginary cheese.
The cameras show a meteor bouncing harmlessly past. {sidekick} gives you a calm thumbs-up.
{quest_giver} points at the floor — invisible pawprints lead across {room}.
Crawl on your hands and knees and follow them slowly.
Count the prints up to {count} before they vanish.
{quest_giver} whispers: who made these prints?
A glowing fox steps out and bows. {quest_giver} hands you a glittering invisible token.
A cub yawns, curls beside you, and falls asleep on your foot.
A grinning cat darts past, leaving a single feather. {quest_giver} laughs and pockets it.
{friend} hands you imaginary bubble-wrap to march on through {room}.
Stomp {count} times in a row, popping each bubble loudly.
Now stomp super-quiet, like a tiptoeing mouse.
{friend} grins and starts a parade chant — copy it three times.
{guide_mentor} taps a tiny globe — you both shrink and step inside the snow in {room}.
Twirl {count} times to make the snow swirl.
Pick up a {adjective} {prop} — it is now your sled.
Slide across the floor while {guide_mentor} narrates the ride.
A snow-fox blocks the path.
The fox melts the snowflake on its nose and lets you pass with a wink.
The fox sighs happily and curls up — {guide_mentor} bows to your kindness.
{helper_townsperson} ties on an apron — you are opening a pretend cookie shop in {room}.
Find {count} round objects — those are your cookies.
Stack them into the most {adjective} display you can manage.
{helper_townsperson} calls in your first customer — you!
{quest_giver} unrolls a banner — the kingdom of {room} needs a parade.
March {count} steps with your back as straight as a tower.
Wave to imaginary crowds on both sides — slow and royal.
{quest_giver} shouts: how will the parade end?
Trumpets fanfare and {quest_giver} hands you a paper crown.
Pretend doves swirl up and {quest_giver} watches them in awe.
{quest_giver} squelches into the imaginary swamp of {room}.
Hop on {count} dry tiles, never touching the floor.
Find the most {adjective} {prop} — that is a clue.
A muddy frog blocks the trail.
The frog bows and hops aside. {quest_giver} grins and leads on.
The frog joins your croak chorus — {quest_giver} can barely stop laughing.
{guide_mentor} hands you an invisible net — the stars of {room} are falling tonight.
Reach up and catch {count} pretend stars.
Hold the brightest one close to your chest.
{guide_mentor} asks where to put it.
It glows softly all day. {guide_mentor} nods — you are now a star carrier.
You throw it gently up. {guide_mentor} smiles as the sky thanks you.
{helper_townsperson} starts up the pretend toy-wash conveyor in {room}.
Bring {count} toys to the start of the line.
Wipe each one with an imaginary sponge — make a swooshy sound.
Dry them off by spinning around once.
{helper_townsperson} inspects the line and gives a thumbs up.
{guide_mentor} points at the ceiling — those clouds need herding across {room}.
Whistle softly {count} times to call the clouds.
Sweep your arms wide and guide them along.
{guide_mentor} asks which cloud is lost.
The fluffy cloud rejoins the herd. {guide_mentor} nods proudly.
The wispy one curls around your ankles and follows you home.
{quest_giver} drops {count} pretend pebbles across {room}.
Step only on the {adjective} pebbles.
Reach the end without falling into pretend lava!

templates.title: The baker who forgot the recipe

steps.text: {needs_saving} looks panicked — they have forgotten how to bake!
Help by listing {count} ingredients out loud.
Pretend to stir a giant bowl while {needs_saving} cheers.
Slide the imaginary tray into the oven.
Ding! What did you bake?
{needs_saving} hugs you — the cookie is rescued and so is the day.
The cake wobbles but stands. {needs_saving} dabs frosting on your nose.
{trickster} whisper-conducts a tiny ghost orchestra in {room}.
Hum {count} long whoo sounds to start the band.
Pretend to play a swooshy trombone.
{trickster} ends the song with a giant silent gesture.
{sidekick} spots a wobbly branch bridge across {room}.
Cross with arms out, taking {count} careful steps.
Stop halfway and look down at the pretend river.
{sidekick} whispers — what is in the river?
The fish wave with their fins. {sidekick} waves back gravely.
Otters do a synchronized splash routine. {sidekick} gives them a 10/10.
{helper_townsperson} ties on a striped apron — the balloon shop in {room} is open!
Blow into a pretend balloon {count} times.
Hand it to the most {adjective} customer you can imagine.
{helper_townsperson} cheers and rings a tiny bell.
{guide_mentor} flicks on an imaginary headlamp — the cave in {room} sparkles.
Crawl forward {count} steps, very slowly.
Listen for the {adjective} drips — point when you hear one.
Glowworms light up overhead.
The glowworms blink back. {guide_mentor} nods — you have made friends.
They light your path all the way home. {guide_mentor} bows in thanks.
{boss_mini_boss} rises from a puddle in {room} — splashy and {adjective}.
Dodge {count} pretend water-bombs by jumping side to side.
Grab a {prop} — it becomes your shield.
Block one final wave from {boss_mini_boss}.
{boss_mini_boss} laughs and drops a treasure.
Inside: a glittering pretend pearl. {boss_mini_boss} salutes you.
You split the treasure in half — {boss_mini_boss} approves with a fist bump.
{trickster} shouts a tiny silly word into {room}.
Repeat it {count} times, each one quieter.
Now repeat it once super loud!
{helper_townsperson} declares the garden in {room} is too dry.
Stomp {count} times to wake the clouds.
Wiggle your fingers like raindrops above your head.
{helper_townsperson} smiles — the garden is happy.
{needs_saving} the pirate has lost their parrot somewhere in {room}.
Whistle {count} times — that is the parrot's signal.
Look up high — birds love high places!
Find the most {adjective} hiding spot.
There it is! {needs_saving} thanks you with a hearty arr.
The parrot is up there grinning. {needs_saving} hoists you up to fetch it.
{guide_mentor} whispers — the castle in {room} is enchanted to stay silent.
Tiptoe for {count} steps without making a sound.
Touch the most {adjective} object you can find.
{guide_mentor} nods slowly. You have lifted the enchantment.
{sidekick} steers the ship into pizza planet — landing zone is {room}.
Roll out the dough by spinning around {count} times.
Pick the most {adjective} topping you can think of.
{sidekick} bites in — yum! Now everyone gets a slice.
{helper_townsperson} welcomes you to the mushroom village hidden in {room}.
Greet {count} tiny mushroom neighbors with a small bow.
Sit on the {adjective} stool and listen to a tiny story.
{helper_townsperson} thanks you and offers a glowing acorn.
{trickster} sneaks into the kitchen in {room} — time for midnight cooking!
Whisper a recipe in {count} ingredients.
Pretend to mix with a giant spoon and add the {adjective} secret.
{trickster} taste-tests and reacts dramatically.
{trickster} flops on the floor — disaster! You both giggle.
{trickster} kisses their fingers — bellissimo! A new dish is born.
{quest_giver} the bookworm has lost a page somewhere in {room}.
Search {count} hiding spots in slow careful steps.
Hold up the most {adjective} {prop} — pretend it is the page.
{quest_giver} cheers loudly — the story is saved!
{quest_giver} appears all in white and asks for help warming up {room}.
Rub your hands together {count} times.
Hop until you are toasty and your cheeks are pink.
{quest_giver} laughs softly and gives you a tiny snowflake gift.
{guide_mentor} hands you secret glasses — welcome to spy training in {room}.
Memorize {count} objects in front of you.
Close your eyes — name them all.
{guide_mentor} tests you with a sneaky question.
{guide_mentor} pats your shoulder. You are now Agent Wonderful.
{guide_mentor} bursts into a laugh — that was the most creative thing all week.
{helper_townsperson} opens the carrot stand in {room}.
Stack {count} pretend carrots tall and proud.
Shout your best vegetable jingle.
{needs_saving} the bear has lost their honey jar in {room}.
Sniff around {count} times like a curious bear cub.
Search behind something {adjective} and soft.
{needs_saving} rumbles happily and shares a tiny pretend spoonful.
{sidekick} points up — a comet streaks across {room}!
Run {count} steps to keep up.
Reach out and pluck a pretend tail-spark.
{friend} suggests a slow-motion snail race across {room}.
Move forward {count} steps — but each one must take ten seconds.
Wiggle your antennae (two fingers above your head).
{friend} declares both of you champions.
{guide_mentor} unlocks the floating library hanging above {room}.
Float through {count} aisles on tiptoe.
Pick the most {adjective} pretend book from the shelf.
Open it — what is inside?
{guide_mentor} hums along to the lullaby until the room glows.
{guide_mentor} winks — that map leads back to bed for sweet dreams.
{helper_townsperson} ties on a tiny apron — the stable in {room} needs care.
Brush {count} pretend horses with long gentle strokes.
Feed each one an imaginary {adjective} carrot.
{helper_townsperson} pats your shoulder — the horses are grateful.
{friend} sets up an imaginary lamp in {room} for a shadow show.
Make {count} animal shadows with your hands.
{friend} claps at the most {adjective} one.
{big_bad_boss} grumbles from a corner of {room} — they are out of tea!
Bring {count} pretend cups to brew some.
Pretend to pour while making a sssss steaming sound.
{big_bad_boss} sips and softens.
{big_bad_boss} crunches happily and you have a new pen pal.
{big_bad_boss} hums along, smoke turning into hearts.
{guide_mentor} pulls back the curtain — a wild garden in {room}!
Spot {count} insects (real or pretend) and name them.
Crouch low and watch the most {adjective} one for a whole breath.
{guide_mentor} smiles — you are a fine naturalist.
{boss_mini_boss} the commander lines you up in {room}.
March in place for {count} steps with your back straight.
Salute with your strongest hand.
{boss_mini_boss} nods — drill complete.
{friend} cannonballs into the pretend splash pool in {room}.
Do {count} big imaginary splashes — count them out loud.
Float on your back with a {adjective} sigh.
{friend} reaches out and high-fives you.
{quest_giver} lights a torch — the crystal cave is hidden behind {room}.
Tiptoe forward {count} small steps.
Pick the most {adjective} pretend crystal.
{quest_giver} examines it.
{quest_giver} nods seriously — a secret well kept is a treasure.
{quest_giver} cheers — the whole village will benefit.
{sidekick} revs an imaginary jetpack engine in {room}.
Lean forward and zoom for {count} steps.
Loop the loop by spinning once.
{sidekick} waves a checkered flag.
{quest_giver} announces a banquet for the people of {room}.
Set {count} imaginary plates on a long royal table.
Walk slowly down the table like a royal server.
{quest_giver} raises a goblet in your honor.
{sidekick} the robot rolls into {room} for a picnic.
Lay out {count} foil-wrapped pretend sandwiches.
Beep-boop for the most {adjective} bite.
{friend} dares you to a spinning star contest in {room}.
Spin {count} times slowly — never fall over.
Strike your best star pose at the end.
{frenemy} the ghost wants to be SCARIER and asks for help in {room}.
Make {count} different boo sounds — your scariest!
Float around the room with arms out.
{frenemy} reviews your work and decides you are too cute to be scary.
{guide_mentor} suggests burying a time capsule somewhere in {room}.
Pick {count} small treasures from your imagination.
Wrap them carefully and choose the most {adjective} hiding spot.
{guide_mentor} promises to open it together in ten years.
{big_bad_boss} the silver dragon perches dramatically in {room}.
Approach with {count} brave steps.
Compliment the most {adjective} scale you can see.
{big_bad_boss} shares a secret.
{big_bad_boss} nods regally and dubs you Trustworthy.
{big_bad_boss} laughs — cleverness wins another tale.
{needs_saving} the sailor washes up on the shore of {room}.
Build a tiny pretend shelter from {count} cushions.
Light an imaginary signal fire — wave your arms high.
{needs_saving} is rescued and sings of your kindness.
{helper_townsperson} the inventor mouse needs a hand in {room}.
Twist {count} imaginary screws clockwise.
Push the big red pretend button.
{helper_townsperson} cheers — the invention works!
{helper_townsperson} lights tiny lanterns across {room} for the fairy market.
Lay out {count} pretend stalls in a circle.
Greet the most {adjective} fairy with a tiny bow.
{helper_townsperson} declares the market open with a cheer.
{guide_mentor} bundles you up — the frostlands stretch across {room}.
Walk {count} steps with arms wrapped tight.
Spot the most {adjective} ice sculpture in the distance.
{guide_mentor} hands you a hot pretend cocoa.
{trickster} announces the floor in {room} is now crooked!
Walk {count} steps tilted to one side.
Reach for a {adjective} {prop} on the slanted wall.
{trickster} flips it back with a clap.
{guide_mentor} opens the gates to the planet zoo in {room}.
Visit {count} pretend alien-animal enclosures.
Greet the most {adjective} creature with a wave.
{guide_mentor} pins a tiny badge on your shirt.
{sidekick} shrinks you both inside a giant pretend cup in {room}.
Climb {count} bumps up the side of the cup.
Wave to the {adjective} creatures peering in from above.
{sidekick} pulls a tiny ladder up and out you go.
{helper_townsperson} hands you a tiny lamp — the harbor in {room} is dark.
Light {count} pretend lamps one by one.
Stand still and admire the glow.
{helper_townsperson} whispers thanks — the ships can come home.
{needs_saving} is tangled in a giant pretend rope in {room}.
Pull {count} loops loose one at a time.
Give the final knot a soft tug.
{needs_saving} jumps free and cheers your patience.
{sidekick} points at a tower of pillows — Mount Pillow rises in {room}!
Climb {count} pretend ledges with strong steady steps.
Plant a flag of victory on top.
{sidekick} snaps an imaginary photo for the news.
{helper_townsperson} taps a tiny baton — the frog choir of {room} is ready.
Croak {count} different notes in a row.
Pretend to hold a tiny program book and turn the page.
{helper_townsperson} bows deeply at the end of the song.
{helper_townsperson} guides you under a leaf to the moss village hidden in {room}.
Tiptoe past {count} tiny pretend doors.
Knock on the most {adjective} one.
{helper_townsperson} introduces you to the moss mayor.

templates.title: A parade of all pink things

steps.text: {friend} declares a parade of pink things in {room}.
Find {count} pink-ish objects fast.
Line them up and march alongside.
{friend} pretends to be a wax statue in the museum of {room}.
Freeze in the most {adjective} pose for {count} long seconds.
Slowly come back to life like the wax is melting.
{friend} bursts out laughing at your face.
{guide_mentor} hands you a pretend quill — chart the lands of {room}.
Walk {count} corners and call out what you see.
Name the most {adjective} corner of all.
{guide_mentor} rolls up your map with a proud nod.
{trickster} announces popcorn is raining from the sky over {room}!
Catch {count} pretend kernels in your open hand.
Eat the most {adjective} piece with a loud crunch.
{trickster} sends one last giant kernel for the road.
{quest_giver} drops {count} mossy stones across {room}.
Hop only on the {adjective} ones.
{quest_giver} cheers — you have not woken the cave bear.
{sidekick} climbs aboard the giant pretend carrot ship parked in {room}.
Count down from {count} — blast off!
Lean back as the ship rumbles toward the moon.
{sidekick} plants a tiny carrot flag on landing.
{big_bad_boss} stretches into a long shadow on the wall of {room}.
Step in and out of the light {count} times to confuse them.
Now point at the brightest spot you can find.
{big_bad_boss} shrinks down to a friendly puddle of shade.
{friend} twirls into the imaginary meadow that is {room}.
Spin {count} times barefoot in the pretend grass.
Lay down and feel the breeze on your face.
{needs_saving} the siren has lost their voice in {room}.
Hum {count} soft notes to gift back.
Pretend to hand them a tiny sparkling note.
{needs_saving} sings out — the harbor lights up.
{helper_townsperson} pins a paper sash on you — you are mayor of {room} today.
Make {count} important pretend announcements.
Cut a ribbon with your fingers.
{helper_townsperson} leads the crowd in a tiny cheer.
{guide_mentor} leads you down the pretend forest path of {room}.
Listen — name {count} pretend forest sounds.
Peek behind the most {adjective} pretend tree.
{guide_mentor} discovers a clearing — and your snack is waiting.
{trickster} hops on an imaginary broom in {room}.
Race {count} laps around the room — broom power!
Loop dramatically over a pillow.
{trickster} declares you broom-racing champion.
{friend} suggests stretching like a jellyfish in {room}.
Reach up tall, sway gently {count} times.
Drift sideways like the current is carrying you.
{friend} bumps your shoulder gently — jelly hug.
{trickster} hands you invisible magic shoes for {room}.
Pull them on with {count} firm tugs.
Walk forward — your steps are now {adjective}!
{trickster} laughs and challenges you to dance.
{helper_townsperson} fires up the spy gadget workshop in {room}.
Twist {count} imaginary dials and listen for the click.
Test the gadget on the most {adjective} object you see.
{helper_townsperson} stamps it APPROVED.
{guide_mentor} the owl perches in a corner of {room}.
Whisper {count} soft hoots to the windows.
Sway side to side like a branch in a calm breeze.
{guide_mentor} tucks an invisible blanket around your shoulders.
{quest_giver} reveals: a chocolate fountain runs hidden in {room}!
Follow {count} sweet pretend footprints to find it.
Dip a pretend strawberry in.
{quest_giver} steals a bite and grins guiltily.
{quest_giver} hugs you — friendship sweeter than chocolate.
{quest_giver} bows in exaggerated apology and the room fills with laughter.
{helper_townsperson} sets up a vigil of pretend candles around {room}.
Light {count} candles slowly and carefully.
Stand in the glow for one long breath.
{helper_townsperson} hums quietly and you join in.

templates.title: The big mouse, the small lion

steps.text: {frenemy} the mouse is bossing around the lion of {room}.
Negotiate with {count} polite words.
Make a friendship pact in the most {adjective} corner.
{frenemy} squeaks, the lion roars — a new band is born.
{guide_mentor} points to a glowing door in {room}.
The door whispers — answer with {count} silly words.
Knock the most {adjective} knock you can.
The door swings open.
{guide_mentor} follows you into a glittering hallway.
{guide_mentor} laughs — clever and quick, that is you.
{trickster} swirls a pretend wand and storms gather over {room}.
Stomp {count} times for thunder.
Wiggle your fingers for rain, then sway your arms for wind.
{trickster} clears the sky with a tiny clap.
{friend} sets up a silly spot-check in {room}.
Point at {count} things that look out of place.
Laugh at the most {adjective} one.
{helper_townsperson} starts up the bounce factory in {room}.
Test {count} bouncing surfaces with your feet.
Find the most {adjective} bounce of the day.
{helper_townsperson} writes you into the bounce hall of fame.
{quest_giver} drops a single red feather in the middle of {room}.
Follow it for {count} steps without making noise.
Find the most {adjective} clue along the way.
{quest_giver} reveals the feather belongs to a friendly phoenix.
{helper_townsperson} forges candy armor in {room}.
Hammer {count} pretend strikes — clang, clang!
Polish the most {adjective} piece until it gleams.
{helper_townsperson} crowns you Sir Sweet of {room}.
{guide_mentor} kneels by the imaginary whisper well in {room}.
Whisper {count} kind wishes into it.
Wait for the well to echo back.
{guide_mentor} nods — your wishes have been heard.
{sidekick} loads a tiny rocket with letters in {room}.
Count down from {count} and launch!
Run to deliver the letter to the most {adjective} planet.
{sidekick} cheers — mail run a success.
{quest_giver} dares you to build a popsicle bridge across {room}.
Place {count} pretend sticks side by side.
Tap each one to test if it is the most {adjective}.
{quest_giver} skips across and applauds.
{guide_mentor} dives with you into the glowing reef of {room}.
Greet {count} glowfish with small bubbles.
Float past the most {adjective} coral.
{guide_mentor} surfaces with a satisfied sigh.
{friend} drives the imaginary party bus through {room}.
Honk {count} times to start the tour.
Lean side to side as the bus turns corners.
{friend} parks and the music turns up to dance.
{needs_saving} the mermaid is lonely in the imaginary tide pool of {room}.
Draw {count} pretend pictures in the air for her.
Pick the most {adjective} doodle.
{needs_saving} claps with her tail and waves goodbye.
{friend} arranges pretend pebbles in a circle in {room}.
Tap each one for a different note — make {count} sounds.
Hum along until the pattern feels {adjective}.
{guide_mentor} cranks up the star-forge in {room}.
Pump the imaginary bellows {count} times.
Pick the most {adjective} pretend spark to keep.
{guide_mentor} releases the new star into the night.
{sidekick} pushes off in a tiny pillow boat across {room}.
Paddle with {count} long imaginary strokes.
Spot a most {adjective} island and steer toward it.
{sidekick} lands the boat and plants a flag.
{trickster} points at the imaginary noodle tree growing in {room}.
Pick {count} pretend noodles from the branches.
Slurp the most {adjective} one with a loud sound.
{guide_mentor} taps a wooden sword — knight school in {room} is in session.
Practice {count} careful parries with an invisible blade.
Bow with grace to your training partner.
{guide_mentor} dubs you Sir or Dame of {room}.
{friend} blows pretend bubbles all over {room}.
Pop {count} of them with a single finger jab.
Catch one on your nose without popping it.
{frenemy} the moss monster has set up a tea party in {room}.
Pour {count} pretend cups for the guests.
Compliment the most {adjective} hat at the table.
{frenemy} declares you Honored Guest forever.
{sidekick} climbs aboard the sky train pulled by clouds across {room}.
Punch {count} pretend tickets.
Wave to the {adjective} planets passing by.
{sidekick} announces the final stop with a tiny bell.

templates.title: The tiny door under the table

steps.text: {quest_giver} points under the table in {room} — a tiny door!
Knock {count} times in a secret pattern.
Crouch low and peek through the keyhole.
{quest_giver} hands you a key.
Inside is a tiny library lined with stars. {quest_giver} smiles.
{quest_giver} approves — every great quest needs a sequel.
{guide_mentor} dims the lights of {room} for a lullaby.
Hum {count} soft notes in a row.
Sway slowly side to side.
{guide_mentor} smiles — the day has been a kind one.
